title: ortachne tenuis
intro: Ortachne tenuis, also known as slender grass or wire grass, is a type of grass native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Ortachne tenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
